name: Holiday Meringues- Dkp
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg whites (at room temperature) in a small bowl at high speed of an electric mixer until foamy.
2. Add cream of tartar and vanilla, beating until soft peaks form.
3. Spoon meringue mixture into 10 mounds on a baking sheet lined with heavy brown paper. Shape meringue mixture into circles, using the back of a spoon to mound the sides at least 1/2 inch higher than the centers.
4. Bake at 225°F for 1 hour. Turn oven off, and let meringues cool completely before opening the oven door.
5. Transfer meringues to serving plates.
6. Scoop sherbet into shells; top with Cranberry Sauce, and serve immediately.
